description.description: Specifies a general description for the resource; can be null if not provided.

ip_address.description: Assigns a specific IP address to the resource; ensure it is valid and not already in use.

ip_protocol.description: Defines the IP protocol type such as TCP or UDP; ensure compatibility with services used.

ip_version.description: Specifies the IP version, either IPv4 or IPv6; must be compatible with the network configuration.

labels.description: Associates key-value pairs for resource categorization; keys and values must be strings.

load_balancing_scheme.description: Determines the load balancing method, typically 'EXTERNAL' or 'INTERNAL'; affects traffic routing.

metadata_filters.description: Applies filters based on metadata; must define filter criteria and corresponding labels.

name.description: Sets the resource name, must be unique within the project and non-null.

network.description: Specifies the network to which the resource is connected; ensure it exists and is correctly named.

network_tier.description: Indicates the network tier, such as 'PREMIUM' or 'STANDARD'; impacts performance and cost.

no_automate_dns_zone.description: If true, disables automatic DNS zone management; use with caution to avoid DNS conflicts.

port_range.description: Defines the range of ports for the resource; format must be 'start-end' or a single port number.

project.description: Specifies the project within which the resource is managed; ensure it matches the intended scope.

service_directory_registrations.description: Lists service directory registrations, including optional namespace and region; useful for service discovery.

source_ip_ranges.description: Defines the list of source IP ranges allowed; must be valid CIDR blocks.

subnetwork.description: Specifies the subnetwork for resource allocation; ensure it is part of the defined network.

target.description: Identifies the target resource or service; must be non-null and correctly configured.

timeouts.description: Configures operation timeouts with optional values for create, delete, and update operations.
